expectations.evidence: CoSecConfigurer.applyTo(fetcher) adds CoSecRequestInterceptor which adds CoSec headers

expectations.text: AuthorizationRequestInterceptor adds Bearer token to requests
expectations.evidence: AuthorizationRequestInterceptor with tokenManager is explicitly added to fetcher.interceptors.request

expectations.text: AuthorizationResponseInterceptor handles 401 and retries with new token
expectations.evidence: AuthorizationResponseInterceptor with tokenManager is added to handle 401 responses

expectations.text: Interceptor chain handles token refresh flow correctly
expectations.evidence: Token refresh flow is handled by JwtTokenManager with TokenRefresher

expectations.text: Proper error handling for refresh failures
expectations.evidence: onUnauthorized callback handles session expiration and redirects to login

claims.evidence: ProtectedApiService class with getUserProfile, getOrders, createOrder methods

eval_feedback.overall: All assertions pass. Implementation correctly uses CoSec interceptors and proper token refresh.
